channel.title: Cloudflare R2 Incidents
channel.description: RSS feed of Cloudflare incidents related to R2

item.title: Errors adding R2 custom domains
item.description:
Cloudflare is aware of and investigating an issue with adding R2 custom domains which potentially impacts multiple customers. This does not impact serving or uploading R2 objects.
We are working to analyse and mitigate this problem. More updates to follow shortly.
